---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? (Not "I want X" but "I'm trying to
do Y, and Z gets in the way.")

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see happen. Concrete > abstract.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about, and why you didn't pick them.

## Additional context

Use cases, screenshots, links to relevant code, prior art. Anything that
helps us understand the shape of the work.

## Out of scope?

If this might be deliberately out of scope for HashedNetworks (e.g.,
something that belongs in a peer-side library rather than the broker),
note that here.
